title: Project Viewer
desc: Lightweight web app that renders a repository's file tree, file contents, commit metadata and an embedded live demo so users can inspect code and interact with the running app without cloning.
tagline: Browse Code. Review Live. No Clone Required.
usage: Paste a GitHub repo URL or select from examples → browse files, switch branches or commits → open the demo panel to interact with the deployed app. Use the share button to copy a permalink to the current view.

features.name: File Tree Browser
features.description: Navigate repository structure instantly without cloning

features.name: Code Viewer
features.description: View file contents with syntax highlighting and formatting

features.name: Commit History
features.description: Inspect commit metadata, authors, dates, and file diffs

features.name: Live Demo Panel
features.description: Embedded live app preview for interactive testing

features.name: Branch & Commit Switching
features.description: Switch between branches and commits instantly

features.name: Share Links
features.description: Generate permalinks to specific files or commits for QA/reviews

benefits: No local clone required — preview any branch instantly
Side-by-side code and live demo for faster reviews
Inspect commit history and file diffs
Generate sharable links for QA/reviews
useCase: Perfect for code reviews, QA testing, onboarding, and sharing code without setup

title: Free API Encyclopedia
desc: A curated directory of 212+ free public APIs featuring authentication details, rate limits, live demos (with CORS proxy), and ready-to-run examples in cURL, JavaScript, and Python.
tagline: Discover APIs. Test Live. Code Ready.
usage: Browse or search APIs → open an API page to see auth, rate limits, example requests and an embedded live demo → run examples via the CORS proxy or export/share the request for testing.

features.name: API Directory
features.description: Curated collection of 212+ free public APIs

features.name: Authentication Details
features.description: Complete auth methods, API keys, and OAuth information

features.name: Rate Limits
features.description: Clear rate limiting information for each API

features.name: Live Demo
features.description: Interactive API testing with CORS proxy support

features.name: Code Examples
features.description: Ready-to-run examples in cURL, JavaScript, and Python

features.name: Export & Share
features.description: Export requests and share with team for collaboration

benefits: Accurate, curated API metadata for faster prototyping
Interactive live demos through a CORS proxy
Copy-ready examples in multiple languages
Export and share working requests for collaboration
useCase: Ideal for developers, students, and teams exploring APIs without local setup

title: PrivMITLab LifeLog
tagline: Own Your Data. Track Your Life. Stay Private.
subtitle: Privacy-First Student Daily Life & Study Tracker
desc: A complete personal data management tool for students to log daily activities, track study sessions, write secure journal entries, and analyze progress — all while keeping data completely private and local to your device.
usage: Open the app → log daily activities and mood → track study sessions with subjects and timestamps → write journal entries → view analytics dashboard → export data as JSON backup.

features.name: Daily Life Register
features.description: Log activities, mood, and daily reflections with timestamps

features.name: Study Tracker
features.description: Track subjects studied, start/end times, and view detailed study analytics

features.name: Journal (Jivani)
features.description: Personal secure daily stories — write and store private journal entries locally

features.name: Offline / Local Storage
features.description: All data stays rigorously inside your browser using localStorage — no internet required

features.name: JSON Import/Export
features.description: Secure your local data via JSON file backups and restore on other devices

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Daily study breakdowns, progress tracking, and trends over time with charts

setup.local: Simply open index.html in your browser. All code runs locally.
setup.deployment: This project is production-ready for Vercel deployment without any build step required.

benefits: Complete data ownership — everything stored locally
Zero setup required — open and use immediately
Perfect for students — track study time, mood, and progress
Offline capable — works without internet connection
Secure backups — export data as JSON files
No tracking or external calls — true privacy
Analytics-rich — visualize your daily patterns and study progress
useCase: Essential for students who want complete control over their personal data while tracking academics and daily life

title: PRIVACYCORE
subtitle: Zero-Knowledge Text & Security Tools
desc: A comprehensive offline privacy toolkit featuring text transformation, password generation, and encryption/encoding tools — all running locally in your browser with zero data collection.
usage: Enter text in the input stream → select transformation (uppercase, lowercase, reverse, etc.) → configure repeat count and options → view output → copy results. Switch between tools using the toolbar: Text Repeater, Password Generator, Encoder/Secret.

features.name: Text Repeater
features.description: Repeat, transform, and manipulate text with multiple options

features.name: Text Transformations
features.description: Convert to UPPERCASE, lowercase, REVERSE text, and clear input

features.name: Find & Replace
features.description: Search for text patterns and replace with custom strings

features.name: Repeat Configuration
features.description: Set repeat count, add new lines, and enable numbering

features.name: Password Generator
features.description: Generate secure random passwords with customizable length and character sets

features.name: Encoder/Secret
features.description: Encode and decode text using various cipher methods

features.name: Input Stream
features.description: Real-time character count and live text input tracking

features.name: Output Panel
features.description: View transformed results with copy-to-clipboard functionality

tools.name: Text Repeater / Tools
tools.description: Transform and repeat text with uppercase, lowercase, reverse, find & replace

tools.name: PWD Generator
tools.description: Create secure random passwords with custom parameters

tools.name: Encoder/Secret
tools.description: Encrypt, encode, and decode sensitive text securely

capabilities: Find & Replace — Search and replace text patterns
Repeat Text — Duplicate text with custom count
New Line — Add line breaks between repeats
Blank Text — Remove or clean text
benefits: Complete offline functionality — no internet required
Zero-knowledge architecture — no data sent anywhere
All processing happens locally in your browser
No external APIs or tracking
Secure password generation
Multiple encoding/encryption options
Copy-to-clipboard for easy sharing
Real-time character counting
Simple, intuitive interface

privacyPromise.description: PRIVACYCORE is built on zero-knowledge principles:
guarantees: All computation happens locally in your browser

useCase: Perfect for developers, security professionals, and privacy-conscious users who need offline text transformation, password generation, and encoding tools without any cloud dependency

title: PrivMITLab Code Leak Scanner
tagline: Block Everything. Trust Nothing. Control Everything.
subtitle: Privacy-First Secret Detection Tool
desc: A comprehensive privacy-first secret detection tool that scans code for accidentally exposed API keys, tokens, passwords, and sensitive data. 100% client-side processing with zero telemetry or data transmission.
usage: Paste code, upload files, or drag & drop → click 'Scan' or use Ctrl+Enter → view detailed security report with severity levels → use quick fix suggestions to remediate issues → export results as JSON or TXT.

features.name: Secret Detection
features.description: Detects 20+ types of sensitive information including API keys, tokens, private keys, and passwords

features.name: Dark/Light Theme Toggle
features.description: Comfortable viewing in any lighting condition with theme persistence

features.name: Fully Responsive Design
features.description: Optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

features.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Efficient navigation with hotkeys (Ctrl+Enter to scan, Ctrl+K to clear, Ctrl+H for history)

features.name: Scan History
features.description: Session-based tracking of your last 10 scans with statistics and summaries

features.name: Search & Filter
features.description: Instantly find specific issues in scan results with advanced filtering

features.name: Statistics Dashboard
features.description: Visual risk distribution with progress bars and severity breakdown

features.name: Full Screen Mode
features.description: Distraction-free scanning experience for focused security reviews

features.name: Quick Fix Suggestions
features.description: Context-aware code examples to fix each security issue

features.name: Code Sanitization
features.description: Preview your code with secrets automatically redacted for safe sharing

features.name: Copy to Clipboard
features.description: One-click copy for code snippets and sanitized versions

features.name: Multiple Export Options
features.description: Download as JSON, TXT, or print directly with formatted reports

features.name: Syntax Highlighting
features.description: Detected secrets are highlighted in your code for easy identification

features.name: Line Numbers
features.description: Easy navigation to problematic lines in your code

features.name: File Upload Support
features.description: Support for .js, .ts, .py, .env, .json, .yaml, .java, .go, .cpp, and more

detectionCapabilities: Private Key Blocks (RSA, EC, DSA, OpenSSH)

severityLevels.description: Critical security risks (API keys, private keys, tokens)

privacyPromise.tagline: Your code never leaves your browser.
privacyPromise.description: This tool is designed with privacy as its core principle:
whatWeDo: All regex pattern matching in browser
No external network requests during scanning
No cookies or local storage of code
No third-party scripts or CDN dependencies

benefits: 100% client-side scanning — no server dependency
Zero data transmission — complete privacy guarantee
No telemetry or tracking — true offline tool
Open source — full transparency on how it works
Fast scanning — instant results on your device
Comprehensive detection — 20+ secret types covered
User-friendly interface — intuitive design for all skill levels
Multiple export formats — JSON, TXT, and print options
Keyboard shortcuts — power user efficiency
Session history — track your recent scans
Code sanitization — safe sharing of code examples
Multi-file support — scan multiple files at once
quickStart: Use quick fix suggestions to remediate
Export report as JSON or TXT
useCase: Essential for developers, security teams, and DevOps engineers who need to prevent accidental credential leaks in source code without compromising privacy or requiring external services

title: PrivMITLab Privacy Toolkit
tagline: Block Everything. Trust Nothing. Control Everything.
subtitle: Complete Offline Privacy Utility Dashboard
desc: A comprehensive offline privacy utility dashboard featuring password generation, hashing, metadata removal, file encryption, and privacy scoring — all running 100% in your browser with zero server communication.
usage: Open the toolkit → select a tool from the dashboard → enter your data or upload files → configure options as needed → view results or download encrypted/processed files → all processing happens locally on your device.

features.name: Password Generator
features.description: Cryptographically secure random passwords using crypto.getRandomValues()
capabilities: Character type toggles (Uppercase, Lowercase, Numbers, Symbols)

features.name: Hash Generator
features.description: Generate cryptographic hashes from text or files
capabilities: Pure JavaScript MD5 + Web Crypto API

features.name: Metadata Remover
features.description: Remove sensitive metadata from images and documents
capabilities: Removes EXIF data from JPG, PNG
Removes GPS coordinates and camera info
Clean file download with metadata stripped

features.name: File Encryptor / Decryptor
features.description: Secure file encryption and decryption with password protection
capabilities: AES-256-GCM encryption using Web Crypto API

features.name: Privacy Score Scanner
features.description: Analyze and visualize privacy risks for any website
capabilities: Mock privacy analysis for educational purposes

keyFeatures: Hybrid approach: JS for MD5, Web Crypto for SHA

privacyPromise.tagline: This toolkit runs entirely inside your browser. No data is uploaded or stored anywhere.
principles: Zero external APIs — no server communication
Zero tracking — no cookies or identifiers
Zero data transmission — everything stays local
security: Uses crypto.subtle for all encryption operations
No file is uploaded to any server
All operations are sandboxed in browser context
Web Crypto API for cryptographic standards

benefits: 100% offline functionality — no internet required
Zero-knowledge architecture — no data leaves your device
Multiple privacy tools in one dashboard
Military-grade encryption (AES-256-GCM)
Cryptographically secure operations
Instant processing — no server delays
No registration or authentication needed
Open source — full code transparency
Lightweight and fast
Works on any device with a modern browser
Educational value — learn about privacy tools
Batch processing capabilities
quickStart: Select a tool from the dashboard
View results or download processed files
All processing happens locally — no data sent anywhere
buildAndDeploy: Output: optimized single-file with all assets inlined
Deploy to Vercel: Connect GitHub repository
Or deploy to any static hosting service
useCase: Perfect for security professionals, developers, privacy advocates, and anyone who needs offline cryptographic tools, password generation, file encryption, and metadata removal without any cloud dependency or privacy concerns
